name: King River Resources Limited
analysis: KRR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Volume is expanding (2.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.0410. Trade idea: entry A$0.0550, stop A$0.0248, target A$0.1457 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
